name: Assam Gold Estate
description: Malty, brisk, and full-bodied — the classic breakfast cup.

name: Ceylon Highgrown
description: Bright and citrusy with a clean, brisk finish.

name: Smoked Lapsang Souchong
description: Pine-smoked over old growth wood fires. Bold and unmistakable.

name: Earl Grey Reserve
description: Bergamot-scented black tea with a hint of cornflower.

name: Dragonwell Long Jing
description: Pan-fired and chestnut-sweet, from Hangzhou's West Lake.

name: Jasmine Pearl
description: Hand-rolled pearls scented with fresh jasmine blossom.

name: Sencha Asatsuyu
description: Grassy and umami-rich, shaded before harvest for sweetness.

name: Genmaicha Toasted Rice
description: Toasted rice folded into green tea for a nutty, popcorn warmth.

name: Chamomile Meadow
description: Whole chamomile flowers, honeyed and calm before bed.

name: Hibiscus Rose Tisane
description: Tart hibiscus and rosehip with a whisper of rose petal.

name: Peppermint Leaf
description: Whole-leaf peppermint, cool and sharp, single origin.

name: Rooibos Vanilla Bean
description: Red bush tea with real vanilla bean, naturally caffeine-free.

name: Cast Iron Tetsubin Pot
description: Enamel-lined cast iron pot that keeps tea hot for hours.

name: Porcelain Gaiwan
description: Traditional lidded bowl for gongfu-style steeping.

name: Bamboo Tea Scoop
description: Hand-carved bamboo scoop for measuring loose leaf.

name: Glass Infuser Mug
description: Borosilicate glass with a removable infuser basket.
